principles.label: Personal Data Protection Principles
principles.description: Offences related to contraventions of the seven data protection principles under Part II Division 1

registration.label: Registration of Data Controllers
registration.description: Offences relating to the failure to register as a data controller or processing personal data without valid registration, as required under Part II Division 2

processing.label: Processing of Personal Data
processing.description: Offences related to unlawful or improper processing, including failure to comply with data subject rights, failure to appoint a Data Protection Officer, failure to conduct DPIA, and failure to maintain ROPA

disclosure.label: Unauthorized Disclosure
disclosure.description: Offences involving the unauthorized or unlawful disclosure of personal data, whether by data controllers, their employees, or by the Commissioner and regulatory officers

enforcement.label: Enforcement and Investigation
enforcement.description: Offences that obstruct, impede, or undermine the enforcement functions of the Commissioner and authorized officers, including obstruction, false statements, and non-compliance with enforcement notices

data-breach.label: Data Breach Notification
data-breach.description: Offences related to the mandatory data breach notification obligations introduced by the 2024 Amendment Act, including failure to notify the Commissioner within 72 hours and failure to notify affected data subjects

cross-border.label: Cross-Border Personal Data Transfer
cross-border.description: Offences related to the unlawful transfer of personal data outside Malaysia without complying with the requirements under s129, including transfers to non-approved countries and failure to implement adequate safeguards

corporate-liability.label: Body Corporate Turnover-Based Liability
corporate-liability.description: Turnover-based penalties applicable to body corporates under s130 (as amended by A1727). Calculated as the greater of RM3M or 10% of annual Malaysian gross turnover.

maxPenalty.fine: Greater of RM3,000,000 or 10% annual Malaysian turnover

officer-liability.label: Officer Personal Liability for Body Corporate Offences
officer-liability.description: Personal liability of directors, CEOs, managers, secretaries and other officers of a body corporate where the body corporate commits a PDPA offence and the officer consented to, connived in, or whose neglect contributed to the offence (s133A, inserted by A1727).

maxPenalty.fine: Same as the underlying body corporate offence
maxPenalty.imprisonment: Same as the underlying body corporate offence

general.label: General and Miscellaneous Penalties
general.description: General penalty provisions and continuing offence provisions that apply across all categories of offences
